text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, January 28. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: That's wonderful. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Reviewing our household budget today. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
